title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
desc: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
desc: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Tumi Je Amar
desc: When an argument between a husband and wife separates the two for a long time, their sons take certain decisions which bring them back together.

title: Mahajan
desc: A powerful landowner conducts his business and lives his life with cruelty. However, various circumstances influence him to change his nature and tactics over time.

title: Satyam Shivam Sundaram
desc: Laxmi, a milkmaid, falls in love with Kanchan, an influential zamindar's son. Things take a tragic turn when his family disapproves of their alliance.

title: Aakrosh
desc: Two detectives investigate the disappearance of three medical students in a small village, but their search is hampered by corrupt local authorities.

title: Suorani Duorani
desc: The king of Kishangarh marries a girl, unaware that she is a demoness. Upon learning the truth about his stepmother, the prince decides to save his father and their kingdom from her evil plans.
